prestazioni: Engine swap to 2ZZ-GE (1.8L VVTL-i) from the Toyota Celica GT-S with a custom bellhousing adapter for the C59 transaxle, utilizing a TODA Racing Stage 3+ camshaft kit (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) and a HKS Super Power Flow Type-R exhaust manifold for optimized scavenging

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) on a custom top-mount manifold, paired with a Tomei 44mm wastegate and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller, targeting 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) on 98 RON fuel with a custom ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 1500

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) and Cusco 22mm front / 19mm rear adjustable sway bars, combined with Whiteline front camber plates (-2.5° camber) and rear toe arms for aggressive alignment settings
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (WILL Cypha-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler, finished in a two-tone matte black and gloss white scheme with 3M 1080 vinyl accents

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 17x8.5 +35 wheels (ET35) wrapped in Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 225/45R17 tires, paired with DBA 4000 Series slotted rotors and Project Mu B-Spec brake pads for track-ready stopping power

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (WILL Cypha-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries (6-point, TIG-welded, chromoly steel)
